name: the-road-to-unfreedom
description: Timothy Snyder's study of authoritarianism — understanding information warfare, the politics of eternity, strategic relativism, and defending democratic truth.
useCase: Detecting disinformation, understanding authoritarian ideology, defending factuality, strengthening democratic resilience.
knownRisks: Snyder's analysis is focused on Russian authoritarianism — some may find it one-sided
The book was published in 2018 and some specific examples may have evolved
The framework is focused on democratic vulnerability — it may not translate to all political contexts
